data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of inspection history by equipment serial number. The linked use case mentions the need for this requirement but does not provide any endpoints or data that demonstrate how this information can be retrieved or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of inspection history being retrievable by equipment serial number.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate inspection history retrieval
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm retrieval of inspection history by equipment serial number.
